name: codex-science
description: A visual, auditable research workbench from question to reproducible handoff

interface.shortDescription: Visual research workspace with auditable handoff
interface.longDescription: Act as a research concierge with a visual local workspace that coordinates question framing, scientific metadata, literature, datasets, preregistered experiments, compute, reproducible artifacts, manuscripts, evaluations, review, bounded improvement loops, cross-thread continuity, capability auditing, and final handoff.
defaultPrompt: Act as my one-stop research concierge: take my goal and coordinate the full auditable workflow.
Inspect my existing research project, refresh the visual portal, show the real status, and continue the highest-value next step.
Turn my evidence, data, and analysis into a reproducible publication-ready handoff.
